item.hbs_traveler_rewards.enchanted_esse: A dust pile crafted from lapis, redstone, and amethyst
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.iron_bloom.des: Portion of an Iron Ingot that can be used to repair tools or armor but not to create new equipment
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.gold_bloom.des: Portion of a Gold Ingot that can be used to repair tools or armor but not to create new equipment
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.netherite_bloo: Portion of a Netherite Ingot that can be used to repair tools or armor but not to create new equipment
Piece of a diamond that can be used to repair tools or armor but not to create new equipment
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.savior_orb.des: On death the Orb saves your items in it like a chest. It also sets a waypoint to its location and will try to reunite with you when nearby
Combine to create a larger heart portion!
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.half_heart.des: Combine to create a Pure Heart!
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.pure_heart.des: Grants an extra heart of health
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.soulbound_ritu: A magic ritual granted to the Void Worshippers. Right-click to make the current Item Slot 'Soulbound'. Right clicking a slot which is already Soulbound will make an internal inventory slot soulbound.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.fabrication_ri: A magic ritual granted to the Ancient Builders. It duplicates the contentes of a chest filled with building materials.
No spot to place duplicate chest
Must be used on a chest
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.warrior_ritual: A magic ritual granted to the Ancient Warriors. The ritual reduces player attack cooldown and knockback from mobs.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.potion_pot.des: Add ingredients to the Pot and then toss to brew. Cooks potions instantly and shatters on use.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.escape_charm.d: Helps escape from a structure or cave system but only works at full health
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.escape_charm.n: You must be at full health to use the Escape Rope
Could not find a safe location
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.escape_charm.f: Unable to escape from this location
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.escape_charm.n: You must be inside a structure or deep cave to escape
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.anvil_item.rel: This artifact cannot enchant past level %s
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.anvil_item.ite: This item cannot be enchanted past level %s
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.whetstone.desc: Adds 1 level of Sharpness to any weapon in an anvil. Up to Sharpness V.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.bracing.desc: Adds 1 level of Unbreaking to any weapon or equipment item in an anvil. Up to Unbreaking V.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.hourglass.desc: Adds 1 level of Lasting to any item in an anvil. Up to Lasting V.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.netherite_whet: Adds 2 levels of Sharpness to any weapon in an anvil. Up to Sharpness X.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.netherite_brac: Adds 2 levels of Unbreaking to any weapon or equipment item in an anvil. Up to Unbreaking X.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.diamond_hourgl: Adds 2 levels of Lasting to any item in an anvil. Up to Lasting X.
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.empty_totem.de: Preserves fragile items in its single inventory slot. Items cursed with Lasting will not decay while stored in a totem
enchantment.hbs_traveler_rewards.lasting: Item will vanish from your inventory after several minutes or days. Lasting stacks up to X which lasts 64 days
Your %s was reclaimed by the void
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.mob_ward.desc: Right click to add items to the ward. Any mob that drops this item will be warded away
gui.hbs_traveler_rewards.mob_ward.slot_e: Place an item to ward against mobs
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.weathered_bea: A beacon weakened by the passage of time
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.copper_facade: This block may substitute for a copper block in a Beacon Pyramid
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.iron_facade_b: This block may substitute for an iron block in a Beacon Pyramid
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.gold_facade_b: This block may substitute for a gold block in a Beacon Pyramid
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.diamond_facad: This block may substitute for a diamond block in a Beacon Pyramid
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.emerald_facad: This block may substitute for an emerald block in a Beacon Pyramid
block.hbs_traveler_rewards.netherite_fac: This block may substitute for a netherite block in a Beacon Pyramid
effect.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_tra: You may travel freely without climate restrictions or fear of losing your items
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_trave: You may travel freely without climate restrictions or fear of losing your items
effect.hbs_traveler_rewards.builders_fli: Grants Creative Flight until taking damage today. Once lost, you must sleep in a bed to regain flight
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.builders_fligh: Grants Creative Flight until taking damage today. Once lost, you must sleep in a bed to regain flight
effect.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_coo: Blessing keeps you cool in warm climates
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_cool_: Blessing keeps you cool in warm climates
effect.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_war: Blessing keeps you warm in cold climates
item.hbs_traveler_rewards.blessing_warm_: Blessing keeps you warm in cold climates
